overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia II) showing a character walking through a snowy urban environment at night. The character walks along snow-covered streets past vintage 1940s-era cars and brick warehouse buildings, then turns toward wooden dock shacks with the city skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered urban waterfront street with vintage traffic

events.description: vintage sedan with headlights on passes by on the right side of the road
second vintage car passes by on the right, driving along the snowy street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered sidewalk toward the illuminated city skyline in the distance

notable_agents.action: vintage 1940s sedan driving past on the snow-covered road with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: tall red brick industrial buildings with multiple windows and flat roofs
illuminated art deco skyscrapers and clock tower visible in the distance against the night sky
tall ornate streetlights casting warm yellow light on the snow
wooden railing running along the edge of the waterfront walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, snow-covered urban street at night, flanked by brick warehouse buildings on the left and a wooden waterfront railing. Vintage cars pass by on the right while the illuminated city skyline looms ahead. Street lamps cast pools of warm light on the snow as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional dock area with wooden shacks alongside the main road

events.description: passing from area with brick buildings to area with wooden dock shacks on the left
vintage car passes very closely on the right, nearly at sidewalk edge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy path as wooden dock shacks appear on the left side, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: vintage car driving past with snow on its roof and headlights glaring

entered.detail: small dark wooden buildings with snow-covered roofs and lit windows
wooden utility poles with crossbars and electrical wires running along the street

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions from brick warehouses to wooden dock shacks on the left as the character continues walking. The city skyline draws closer while vintage cars pass by frequently on the right. Utility poles line the far right of the street, and the snow-covered ground shows tire tracks from passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden dock shacks approaching parked vehicles

events.description: character turns left away from the main road and walks between the wooden shacks
approaching a snow-covered vintage truck parked between the wooden shacks

agents.ego_description: turning left off the main street and walking between wooden shacks toward a parked truck

notable_agents.action: vintage truck parked between wooden shacks, covered in thick snow

entered.detail: small wooden shack with snow on roof and a bench on the side
stacked wooden crates and containers beside the left shack

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower area between wooden dock shacks, leaving the main street behind. A snow-covered vintage truck is parked ahead between the buildings. Wooden crates line the left side of the path, and the city skyline becomes more distant and partially obscured by the shacks and falling snow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy urban street that gradually shifts from an open industrial thoroughfare into a secluded dockside alley. It begins with the character walking past brick warehouse buildings and a wooden waterfront railing, moving under the warm glow of street lamps toward a looming city skyline. As the character continues forward, the brick architecture transitions into wooden dock shacks on the left while tire tracks mark the snow-covered ground beside passing vintage cars and utility poles. The scene then shifts as the character turns left, leaving the main street behind to enter a narrower path flanked by wooden crates. Finally, the camera moves toward a snow-covered vintage truck parked between the shacks, with the city skyline becoming distant and partially obscured by falling snow.
